TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: nyan ki'an roq na Taywan qaniy qa llaqi tayal ga, garing cqa cka rgyax na Sgaga ki rgyax na quri Hagay, qabax llaqi na tayal ga nyan mqasux maki cqa llyung Mnibu ki llyung Klesan, garing bawiqna rgyax ru tehuk cqa syax na bcilung, qabax roq qaniy ga, giwan pinhkngyan na binheci ta cyunga.Llyung na Mnibu ga giway rrgyax, mkura te biyaqan wagi ga qenah bawiq qa rgyax nya, pisan nqargyax Zirhiy ki rgyax Bayu, tyugan seng meta kinbawiq nya. Puqing kinhulan llyung Mnibu qaniy ga, minkahul cqa gong Sgalup, gong Ggiyu, gong Memutang, gong Bubul qalang na Pyanan,cka na llyung Mnibu ga maki gong na Roba, gong Banun, gong Sesuy ru gong Soko. Roq na llyung Mnibu qaniy ga, giway mttasiq rgyax nya, blaq qa cinbwanan nya, mtasaw qa qsyanya, uka ciyan sinnqwaq nya, s'unan qwas na qbhniq pungan, uka pincpngan kinbleqan salan mcisan ru mangay qabax ccquliq. pisan nqa ryaniq na Qpa, pitung bcilung qalang na Talah, gong na Tamaron, ryaniq qalang na Siyanuh, ocya qalang na Tamaron, ulay qsya qalang na Bonbon, ali hbkiyan qalang Banun, qqhuniq na Tayhezang, pitung rgyax na Hmuqan, qmayah tbihi na Qnoran, san mcisan bcilung na Khuyan, gong na Skikun, qmayah tbihi roq na Mnoyan, gong na Bubul ru rgyax qali qalang Pyanan, babaw quri Sqabu ru llyung na Kulu. Bnrwan qa galan cpung ,Biru skrawan tqbaqan ke na cquliq Tayal
S.PHON: njan kiʔan roq na tajwan qanij qa llaqi tajal ɣa, ɣariŋ ʦ~ʨqa ʦ~ʨka rɣjax na s~ɕɣaɣa ki rɣjax na quri ħaɣaj, qaβax llaqi na tajal ɣa njan mqas~ɕux maki ʦ~ʨqa lljuŋ mniβu ki lljuŋ kles~ɕan, ɣariŋ βawiqna rɣjax ru teħuk ʦ~ʨqa s~ɕjax na βʦ~ʨiluŋ, qaβax roq qanij ɣa, ɣiwan pinħkŋjan na βinħeʦ~ʨi ta ʦ~ʨjuŋa.lljuŋ na mniβu ɣa ɣiwaj rrɣjax, mkura te βijaqan waɣi ɣa qenaħ βawiq qa rɣjax nja, pis~ɕan nqarɣjax zirħij ki rɣjax βaju, tjuɣan s~ɕeŋ meta kinβawiq nja. puqiŋ kinħulan lljuŋ mniβu qanij ɣa, minkaħul ʦ~ʨqa ɣoŋ s~ɕɣalup, ɣoŋ ɣɣiju, ɣoŋ memutaŋ, ɣoŋ βuβul qalaŋ na pjanan,ʦ~ʨka na lljuŋ mniβu ɣa maki ɣoŋ na roβa, ɣoŋ βanun, ɣoŋ s~ɕes~ɕuj ru ɣoŋ s~ɕoko. roq na lljuŋ mniβu qanij ɣa, ɣiwaj mttas~ɕiq rɣjax nja, βlaq qa ʦ~ʨinβwanan nja, mtas~ɕaw qa qs~ɕjanja, uka ʦ~ʨijan s~ɕinnqwaq nja, s~ɕʔunan qwas~ɕ na qβħniq puŋan, uka pinʦ~ʨpŋan kinβleqan s~ɕalan mʦ~ʨis~ɕan ru maŋaj qaβax ʦ~ʨʦ~ʨquliq. pis~ɕan nqa rjaniq na qpa, pituŋ βʦ~ʨiluŋ qalaŋ na talaħ, ɣoŋ na tamaron, rjaniq qalaŋ na s~ɕijanuħ, oʦ~ʨja qalaŋ na tamaron, ulaj qs~ɕja qalaŋ na βonβon, ali ħβkijan qalaŋ βanun, qqħuniq na tajħezaŋ, pituŋ rɣjax na ħmuqan, qmajaħ tβiħi na qnoran, s~ɕan mʦ~ʨis~ɕan βʦ~ʨiluŋ na kħujan, ɣoŋ na s~ɕkikun, qmajaħ tβiħi roq na mnojan, ɣoŋ na βuβul ru rɣjax qali qalaŋ pjanan, βaβaw quri s~ɕqaβu ru lljuŋ na kulu. βnrwan qa ɣalan ʦ~ʨpuŋ ,βiru s~ɕkrawan tqβaqan ke na ʦ~ʨquliq tajal
S.FORM: nyan ki'an roq na Taywan qaniy qa llaqi tayal ga, garing cqa cka rgyax na Sgaga ki rgyax na quri Hagay, qabax llaqi na tayal ga nyan mqasux maki cqa llyung Mnibu ki llyung Klesan, garing bawiqna rgyax ru tehuk cqa syax na bcilung, qabax roq qaniy ga, giwan pinhkngyan na binheci ta cyunga.Llyung na Mnibu ga giway rrgyax, mkura te biyaqan wagi ga qenah bawiq qa rgyax nya, pisan nqargyax Zirhiy ki rgyax Bayu, tyugan seng meta kinbawiq nya. Puqing kinhulan llyung Mnibu qaniy ga, minkahul cqa gong Sgalup, gong Ggiyu, gong Memutang, gong Bubul qalang na Pyanan,cka na llyung Mnibu ga maki gong na Roba, gong Banun, gong Sesuy ru gong Soko. Roq na llyung Mnibu qaniy ga, giway mttasiq rgyax nya, blaq qa cinbwanan nya, mtasaw qa qsyanya, uka ciyan sinnqwaq nya, s'unan qwas na qbhniq pungan, uka pincpngan kinbleqan salan mcisan ru mangay qabax ccquliq. pisan nqa ryaniq na Qpa, pitung bcilung qalang na Talah, gong na Tamaron, ryaniq qalang na Siyanuh, ocya qalang na Tamaron, ulay qsya qalang na Bonbon, ali hbkiyan qalang Banun, qqhuniq na Tayhezang, pitung rgyax na Hmuqan, qmayah tbihi na Qnoran, san mcisan bcilung na Khuyan, gong na Skikun, qmayah tbihi roq na Mnoyan, gong na Bubul ru rgyax qali qalang Pyanan, babaw quri Sqabu ru llyung na Kulu. Bnrwan qa galan cpung ,Biru skrawan tqbaqan ke na cquliq Tayal
S.PHON: njan kiʔan roq na tajwan qanij qa llaqi tajal ɣa, ɣariŋ ʦ~ʨqa ʦ~ʨka rɣjax na s~ɕɣaɣa ki rɣjax na quri ħaɣaj, qaβax llaqi na tajal ɣa njan mqas~ɕux maki ʦ~ʨqa lljuŋ mniβu ki lljuŋ kles~ɕan, ɣariŋ βawiqna rɣjax ru teħuk ʦ~ʨqa s~ɕjax na βʦ~ʨiluŋ, qaβax roq qanij ɣa, ɣiwan pinħkŋjan na βinħeʦ~ʨi ta ʦ~ʨjuŋa.lljuŋ na mniβu ɣa ɣiwaj rrɣjax, mkura te βijaqan waɣi ɣa qenaħ βawiq qa rɣjax nja, pis~ɕan nqarɣjax zirħij ki rɣjax βaju, tjuɣan s~ɕeŋ meta kinβawiq nja. puqiŋ kinħulan lljuŋ mniβu qanij ɣa, minkaħul ʦ~ʨqa ɣoŋ s~ɕɣalup, ɣoŋ ɣɣiju, ɣoŋ memutaŋ, ɣoŋ βuβul qalaŋ na pjanan,ʦ~ʨka na lljuŋ mniβu ɣa maki ɣoŋ na roβa, ɣoŋ βanun, ɣoŋ s~ɕes~ɕuj ru ɣoŋ s~ɕoko. roq na lljuŋ mniβu qanij ɣa, ɣiwaj mttas~ɕiq rɣjax nja, βlaq qa ʦ~ʨinβwanan nja, mtas~ɕaw qa qs~ɕjanja, uka ʦ~ʨijan s~ɕinnqwaq nja, s~ɕʔunan qwas~ɕ na qβħniq puŋan, uka pinʦ~ʨpŋan kinβleqan s~ɕalan mʦ~ʨis~ɕan ru maŋaj qaβax ʦ~ʨʦ~ʨquliq. pis~ɕan nqa rjaniq na qpa, pituŋ βʦ~ʨiluŋ qalaŋ na talaħ, ɣoŋ na tamaron, rjaniq qalaŋ na s~ɕijanuħ, oʦ~ʨja qalaŋ na tamaron, ulaj qs~ɕja qalaŋ na βonβon, ali ħβkijan qalaŋ βanun, qqħuniq na tajħezaŋ, pituŋ rɣjax na ħmuqan, qmajaħ tβiħi na qnoran, s~ɕan mʦ~ʨis~ɕan βʦ~ʨiluŋ na kħujan, ɣoŋ na s~ɕkikun, qmajaħ tβiħi roq na mnojan, ɣoŋ na βuβul ru rɣjax qali qalaŋ pjanan, βaβaw quri s~ɕqaβu ru lljuŋ na kulu. βnrwan qa ɣalan ʦ~ʨpuŋ ,βiru s~ɕkrawan tqβaqan ke na ʦ~ʨquliq tajal
